campaignEffect: The module became Ledgerline's fastest-attaching add-on to date, with case-study-led landing pages converting demo requests well above the prior feature-page baseline and add-on pipeline tracking ahead of the 94-day cycle assumption.
reason: Client said the proposal was the only one that framed the launch around controllers' manual coding burden instead of the AI feature set, and that the numbers behind every channel choice made the plan easy to defend internally.
